name: Aarav Mehta

employment_history.responsibilities: Led strategy engagements primarily for financial services and consumer goods clients across India and Southeast Asia. Banking transformation, retail growth strategy, telecom operating model redesign.
US-focused engagements in technology and pharmaceuticals. Digital transformation at a US healthcare provider. M&A integration for a software company acquisition.

education.institution: The Wharton School, University of Pennsylvania

_comment: Note on languages: This candidate has Hindi (Native) and German (B2). Hindi is not in v1 taxonomy. German below C1 is also not in v1 taxonomy (persona-based decision: a German consultancy rarely receives serious applications with German B2). Both are mapped to 'unmapped'. This is exactly the kind of edge case where v2 should add an aliases.yaml or expand the taxonomy.
